'''tazuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foefie|foefie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-z-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foefie|foefie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tazuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæziyith|tæziyith]] || [[word:tæziyij|tæziyij]] || [[word:tæziyish|tæziyish]] || [[word:tæziyi|tæziyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tazuzuyuth|tazuzuyuth]] || [[word:tazuzuyuj|tazuzuyuj]] || [[word:tazuzuyush|tazuzuyush]] || [[word:tazuzuyu|tazuzuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tazuyuth|tazuyuth]] || [[word:tazuyuj|tazuyuj]] || [[word:tazuyush|tazuyush]] || [[word:tazuyu|tazuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tazufyuth|tazufyuth]] || [[word:tazufyuj|tazufyuj]] || [[word:tazufyush|tazufyush]] || [[word:tazufyuf|tazufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tazuyuthu|tazuyuthu]] || [[word:tazuyuju|tazuyuju]] || [[word:tazuyushu|tazuyushu]] || [[word:tazuyuku|tazuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tazuyuth|tazuyuth]] || [[word:tazuyuj|tazuyuj]] || [[word:tazuyush|tazuyush]] || [[word:tazuyu|tazuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tazuyuthul|tazuyuthul]] || [[word:tazuyujul|tazuyujul]] || [[word:tazuyushul|tazuyushul]] || [[word:tazuyukul|tazuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tazuyuthuthu|tazuyuthuthu]] || [[word:tazuyujuju|tazuyujuju]] || [[word:tazuyushushu|tazuyushushu]] || [[word:tazuyuku|tazuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tazuyuthun|tazuyuthun]] || [[word:tazuyujun|tazuyujun]] || [[word:tazuyushun|tazuyushun]] || [[word:tazuyukun|tazuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tazuyuthuoro|tazuyuthuoro]] || [[word:tazuyujuoro|tazuyujuoro]] || [[word:tazuyushuoro|tazuyushuoro]] || [[word:tazuyukuoro|tazuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
